name: Snowfur
description: Snowfur is Bluestar's litter mate or sister if you prefer. She is open and social unlike her sister who is guarded and reserved. She is a brave Thunderclan warrior when she needs to be though. She is a medium fluffy white she-cat with grey ear tips and tail tip. In this universe Snowfur survives and was Ex-Mates with Thistleclaw fending his 'actions' disgusting to Spottedkit/paw
creator: #24EVER
